decisions.name: Is_Role_and_Profile_Mapping_Valid
decisions.label: Is Role and Profile Mapping Valid

formulas.name: ProfileMapping
formulas.expression: IF({!GetAssignedPermissionSetGroupNames.DeveloperName} = "Loyalty_Operations_Persona", "IHG Loyalty Operations", IF({!GetAssignedPermissionSetGroupNames.DeveloperName} = "Loyalty_Compliance_Persona", "IHG Loyalty Operations", IF({!GetAssignedPermissionSetGroupNames.DeveloperName} = "Loyalty_Financial_Ops_Persona", "IHG Loyalty Operations", IF({!GetAssignedPermissionSetGroupNames.DeveloperName} = "Loyalty_Ops_Leadership_Persona", "IHG Loyalty Operations", IF({!GetAssignedPermissionSetGroupNames.DeveloperName} = "Loyalty_Reporting_Persona", "IHG Loyalty Operations", IF({!GetAssignedPermissionSetGroupNames.DeveloperName} = "Contact_Center_Agent_Persona", "IHG Contact Center Operations", IF({!GetAssignedPermissionSetGroupNames.DeveloperName} = "RCC_Tier_2_Agent_Persona", "IHG Contact Center Operations", IF({!GetAssignedPermissionSetGroupNames.DeveloperName} = "RCC_Leadership_Persona", "IHG Contact Center Operations", IF({!GetAssignedPermissionSetGroupNames.DeveloperName} = "Hotel_Front_Desk_Persona", "IHG Hotel Operations", IF({!GetAssignedPermissionSetGroupNames.DeveloperName} = "Hotel_Manager_Persona", "IHG Hotel Operations", IF({!GetAssignedPermissionSetGroupNames.DeveloperName} = "Field_Marketing_User_Persona", "FM User", IF({!GetAssignedPermissionSetGroupNames.DeveloperName} = "Loyalty_Manual_Voucher_Redemption_Persona", "Loyalty Cloud - Manual Redemption User", IF({!GetAssignedPermissionSetGroupNames.DeveloperName} = "SFL_System_Administrator_Persona", "System Administrator", IF({!GetAssignedPermissionSetGroupNames.DeveloperName} = "Copado_Only_Persona", "Minimum Access - Salesforce", IF({!GetAssignedPermissionSetGroupNames.DeveloperName} = "Voucher_Business_Operations_Persona", "IHG Loyalty Operations", IF({!GetAssignedPermissionSetGroupNames.DeveloperName} = "Loyalty_Read_Only_Persona", "IHG Loyalty Operations", IF({!GetAssignedPermissionSetGroupNames.DeveloperName} = "RCC_Training", "IHG Contact Center Operations", IF({!GetAssignedPermissionSetGroupNames.DeveloperName} = "RCC_Hotel_Agent_Persona", "IHG Contact Center Operations", ""))))))))))))))))))

formulas.name: RoleMapping
formulas.expression: IF({!GetAssignedPermissionSetGroupNames.DeveloperName} = "Loyalty_Operations_Persona", "Loyalty Business Operations", IF({!GetAssignedPermissionSetGroupNames.DeveloperName} = "Loyalty_Compliance_Persona", "Loyalty Compliance", IF({!GetAssignedPermissionSetGroupNames.DeveloperName} = "Loyalty_Financial_Ops_Persona", "Loyalty Financial Operations", IF({!GetAssignedPermissionSetGroupNames.DeveloperName} = "Loyalty_Ops_Leadership_Persona", "Loyalty Operations Leadership", IF({!GetAssignedPermissionSetGroupNames.DeveloperName} = "Loyalty_Reporting_Persona", "Loyalty Operational Reporting and Analysis", IF({!GetAssignedPermissionSetGroupNames.DeveloperName} = "Contact_Center_Agent_Persona", "Contact Center Agent Tier 1", IF({!GetAssignedPermissionSetGroupNames.DeveloperName} = "RCC_Tier_2_Agent_Persona", "Contact Center Agent Tier 2", IF({!GetAssignedPermissionSetGroupNames.DeveloperName} = "RCC_Leadership_Persona", "Contact Center Leadership", IF({!GetAssignedPermissionSetGroupNames.DeveloperName} = "Hotel_Front_Desk_Persona", "Hotel Front Desk", IF({!GetAssignedPermissionSetGroupNames.DeveloperName} = "Hotel_Manager_Persona", "Hotel Management", IF({!GetAssignedPermissionSetGroupNames.DeveloperName} = "Field_Marketing_User_Persona", "Field Marketing Manager", IF({!GetAssignedPermissionSetGroupNames.DeveloperName} = "Loyalty_Manual_Voucher_Redemption_Persona", "Loyalty Manual Redemption", IF({!GetAssignedPermissionSetGroupNames.DeveloperName} = "SFL_System_Administrator_Persona", "CEO", IF({!GetAssignedPermissionSetGroupNames.DeveloperName} = "Copado_Only_Persona", "Copado Only", IF({!GetAssignedPermissionSetGroupNames.DeveloperName} = "Voucher_Business_Operations_Persona", "Voucher Business Operations", IF({!GetAssignedPermissionSetGroupNames.DeveloperName} = "Loyalty_Read_Only_Persona", "Loyalty Read Only", IF({!GetAssignedPermissionSetGroupNames.DeveloperName} = "RCC_Training", "RCC Training", IF({!GetAssignedPermissionSetGroupNames.DeveloperName} = "RCC_Hotel_Agent_Persona", "Contact Center Hotel Agent", ""))))))))))))))))))

formulas.name: UserProfileFormula
formulas.expression: IF({!Get_Permission_Set_Group_Records.DeveloperName} = "Loyalty_Operations_Persona", "IHG Loyalty Operations", IF({!Get_Permission_Set_Group_Records.DeveloperName} = "Loyalty_Compliance_Persona", "IHG Loyalty Operations", IF({!Get_Permission_Set_Group_Records.DeveloperName} = "Loyalty_Financial_Ops_Persona", "IHG Loyalty Operations", IF({!Get_Permission_Set_Group_Records.DeveloperName} = "Loyalty_Ops_Leadership_Persona", "IHG Loyalty Operations", IF({!Get_Permission_Set_Group_Records.DeveloperName} = "Loyalty_Reporting_Persona", "IHG Loyalty Operations", IF({!Get_Permission_Set_Group_Records.DeveloperName} = "Contact_Center_Agent_Persona", "IHG Contact Center Operations", IF({!Get_Permission_Set_Group_Records.DeveloperName} = "RCC_Tier_2_Agent_Persona", "IHG Contact Center Operations", IF({!Get_Permission_Set_Group_Records.DeveloperName} = "RCC_Leadership_Persona", "IHG Contact Center Operations", IF({!Get_Permission_Set_Group_Records.DeveloperName} = "Hotel_Front_Desk_Persona", "IHG Hotel Operations", IF({!Get_Permission_Set_Group_Records.DeveloperName} = "Hotel_Manager_Persona", "IHG Hotel Operations", IF({!Get_Permission_Set_Group_Records.DeveloperName} = "Field_Marketing_User_Persona", "FM User", IF({!Get_Permission_Set_Group_Records.DeveloperName} = "Loyalty_Manual_Voucher_Redemption_Persona", "Loyalty Cloud - Manual Redemption User", IF({!Get_Permission_Set_Group_Records.DeveloperName} = "SFL_System_Administrator_Persona", "System Administrator", IF({!Get_Permission_Set_Group_Records.DeveloperName} = "Copado_Only_Persona", "Minimum Access - Salesforce", IF({!Get_Permission_Set_Group_Records.DeveloperName}= "Voucher_Business_Operations_Persona", "IHG Loyalty Operations", IF({!Get_Permission_Set_Group_Records.DeveloperName}= "Loyalty_Read_Only_Persona", "IHG Loyalty Operations", IF({!Get_Permission_Set_Group_Records.DeveloperName}= "RCC_Training", "IHG Contact Center Operations", IF({!Get_Permission_Set_Group_Records.DeveloperName} = "RCC_Hotel_Agent_Persona", "IHG Contact Center Operations", ""))))))))))))))))))

formulas.name: UserRoleFormula
formulas.expression: IF({!Get_Permission_Set_Group_Records.DeveloperName} = "Loyalty_Operations_Persona", "Loyalty Business Operations", IF({!Get_Permission_Set_Group_Records.DeveloperName} = "Loyalty_Compliance_Persona", "Loyalty Compliance", IF({!Get_Permission_Set_Group_Records.DeveloperName} = "Loyalty_Financial_Ops_Persona", "Loyalty Financial Operations", IF({!Get_Permission_Set_Group_Records.DeveloperName} = "Loyalty_Ops_Leadership_Persona", "Loyalty Operations Leadership", IF({!Get_Permission_Set_Group_Records.DeveloperName} = "Loyalty_Reporting_Persona", "Loyalty Operational Reporting and Analysis", IF({!Get_Permission_Set_Group_Records.DeveloperName} = "Contact_Center_Agent_Persona", "Contact Center Agent Tier 1", IF({!Get_Permission_Set_Group_Records.DeveloperName} = "RCC_Tier_2_Agent_Persona", "Contact Center Agent Tier 2", IF({!Get_Permission_Set_Group_Records.DeveloperName} = "RCC_Leadership_Persona", "Contact Center Leadership", IF({!Get_Permission_Set_Group_Records.DeveloperName} = "Hotel_Front_Desk_Persona", "Hotel Front Desk", IF({!Get_Permission_Set_Group_Records.DeveloperName} = "Hotel_Manager_Persona", "Hotel Management", IF({!Get_Permission_Set_Group_Records.DeveloperName} = "Field_Marketing_User_Persona", "Field Marketing Manager", IF({!Get_Permission_Set_Group_Records.DeveloperName} = "Loyalty_Manual_Voucher_Redemption_Persona", "Loyalty Manual Redemption", IF({!Get_Permission_Set_Group_Records.DeveloperName} = "SFL_System_Administrator_Persona", "CEO", IF({!Get_Permission_Set_Group_Records.DeveloperName} = "Copado_Only_Persona", "Copado Only", IF({!Get_Permission_Set_Group_Records.DeveloperName} = "Voucher_Business_Operations_Persona", "Voucher Business Operations", IF({!Get_Permission_Set_Group_Records.DeveloperName} = "Loyalty_Read_Only_Persona", "Loyalty Read Only", IF({!Get_Permission_Set_Group_Records.DeveloperName} = "RCC_Training", "RCC Training", IF({!Get_Permission_Set_Group_Records.DeveloperName} = "RCC_Hotel_Agent_Persona", "Contact Center Hotel Agent", ""))))))))))))))))))

start.filterFormula:
OR( AND( NOT(ISBLANK({!$Record.FederationIdentifier})), {!$Record.Profile.Name}='Minimum Access - Salesforce', {!$Record.CreatedBy.FirstName} + ' ' + {!$Record.CreatedBy.LastName} ='Sailpoint Integration', ISBLANK({!$Record.UserRoleId}) ),
AND( NOT(ISBLANK({!$Record.FederationIdentifier})), {!$Record.Profile.Name}='Minimum Access - Salesforce', {!$Record.CreatedBy.FirstName} + ' ' + {!$Record.CreatedBy.LastName} ='Sailpoint Integration', NOT(ISBLANK({!$Record.UserRoleId})), NOT(ISCHANGED({!$Record.UserRoleId})) ) )

value.stringValue: Failed to fetch the Permission set Assignments

subflows.name: Handle_Custom_Exception_On_User_Update
subflows.label: Handle Custom Exception On User Update
